approvedBy: Steve via Codex main session overnight approval
approvalSource: Steve approved the overnight Dev-Hub intelligence build and instructed Codex to keep going, park blocked work, and continue safe sprint slices across the intelligence pipe.
scopeSummary: Expose a read-only Dev Hub Route Review Operator Packet that prepares exact route-ID review rows without mutating routes or destinations.
constraints: Do not approve, apply, reject, snooze, reroute, auto-clear, or mutate live action routes.

Do not create backlog cards, Scoper records, Portfolio records, Current Sprint overlays, approval records, destination records, Harlan messages, model calls, extraction runs, connector probes, or external writes.
Do not auto-promote Director recommendations, route rows, repair proposals, or review packets into backlog or Scoper.
Keep real route mutation behind exact route IDs and separate Steve approval.
Fail proof if any row is marked mutated, applied, auto-cleared, or no longer review-only.
